devdoc.details: This contract follows the same pattern as DelayedWETH but for Metis ERC20 token

params._delay: The delay for withdrawals in seconds.

params._amount: Amount of Metis tokens to deposit

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions anymore. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby removing any functionality that is only available to the owner.

totalSupply().details: Returns the amount of tokens in existence.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

params._amount: The amount of WETH to withdraw.

devdoc.title: DelayedWMetis

Unlock(address,address,uint256).notice: Emitted when a withdrawal is unlocked

delay().notice: Returns the delay period for withdrawals

deposit(uint256).notice: Deposits Metis tokens into the contract

hold(address,uint256).notice: Allows the owner to hold tokens from a user

metisToken().notice: Returns the underlying Metis token contract address

recover(uint256).notice: Allows the owner to recover tokens from the contract

withdraw(address,uint256).notice: Extension to withdrawal, must provide a sub-account to withdraw from.

withdrawals(address,address).notice: Returns the withdrawal request for a given user and recipient

userdoc.notice: DelayedWMetis is a wrapper for Metis token that allows for delayed withdrawals.
